mapper.select: SELECT id, repair_request_id, rating, feedback_comment, anonymous_flag, created_at, updated_at FROM repair_feedbacks WHERE repair_request_id = #{repairRequestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_feedbacks ( repair_request_id, rating, feedback_comment, anonymous_flag ) VALUES ( #{repairRequestId}, #{rating}, #{feedbackComment}, #{anonymousFlag} )
